title: Financial Literacy Training * Ex-Offenders - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Financial Literacy Training * Ex-Offenders 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Ex-Offenders Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SPONSORS INC ROSS SHEPARD REENTRY RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment, housing and resource support to individuals with conviction histories. Services include job counseling, interview preparation support, and educational workshops on resume writing, saving and budgeting, and job/housing search strategies. Also provides assistance preparing educational and financial aid applications, housing packets/applications, and other supports to help individuals with conviction histories overcome barriers to employment and housing access. 338 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals with conviction histories Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 505-5682 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPONSORS INC ROSS SHEPARD REENTRY RESOURCE CENTER
